title: EQ - Custom EQ - White circle when changing value on sliders
scenario: Custom EQ slider interaction indicator (white circle) does not appear and follow user movement on all 7 sliders in Custom EQ mode
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Tap and drag any one of the 7 EQ sliders (e.g., 32 Hz, 64 Hz, 125 Hz, 250 Hz, 500 Hz, 1 kHz, 2 kHz, 4 kHz, 8 kHz, 16 kHz) to change its value.
5. While dragging, observe the slider dot.
7. Observe the slider dot after release.
8. Repeat steps 4–7 for each of the remaining 6 sliders.
expected: A white circle appears around the slider dot while the user is interacting with it, follows the user's finger movement, and disappears upon release. This behavior is consistent across all 7 sliders in Custom EQ mode.
